title: New Horizon
description: A Minecraft Overhaul with more to explore and build.
body:
# New Horizons are waiting for you!

![Horizon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60142733f0c91872d8ca153d44c6f431226efbba.png)

**This Modpack brings you fantastic landscapes to explore and conquer. It overhauls Minecraft Worldgeneration with Tectonic and adds some awesome Biomes with William Wythers Expanded Ecospheres. Build your Home, village, city or what ever, with new Blocks and furniture.
New Structures await you with loot and adventure. You can slay your way through those Undead with new weapons and armor and ultimately stand the high ground against the mighty Ender Dragon or other bosses.**

**More to come in future Updates like Quests and more lightweight RPG stuff.**
